caption: An active mid-stage commercial construction site on a clear workday — a partially built multi-story building has visible steel framing on upper floors and finished walls on the lower floors, workers in hard hats and high-vis vests are visible at multiple levels, a yellow crane operates, a bulldozer is parked at the edge, and stacks of construction materials sit on pallets in the foreground.
annotator_notes: Image matches prompt. TRAP NEGATIVE CONTROL — looks damage-like (partial walls, exposed framing, scaffolding) but it is NORMAL construction, not collapse. Building state should be `intact`, NOT `collapsed`/`collapsing`. Workers at height should NOT be at-risk despite the working conditions. No hazards, no edges.
